body.title: DickSimnel's first proven live build: route worker tier to local devstral on Hex, dispatch→DONE→close
body.text:
# D-ds-first-live-build-on-hex-2026-06-30
**title:** DickSimnel's first proven live build on devstral@Hex
**date:** 2026-06-30
**status:** open
**spawned_tickets:** T-ds-hello-build, T-ds-smoke-pytest, T-consequence-D-ds-first-live-build-on-hex

## UPDATE 2026-06-30 (evening) — routing ticket graduated to its own epic
The routing blocker originally spawned here as `T-ds-local-ollama-route` has been RESHAPED and MOVED to D-inference-cost-optimizing-router-2026-06-30 as its **increment 3 (register Hex as the first fully-described source)**. Reason: what began as a one-off 'point devstral at Hex' fix turned out to be the concrete first population of the general cost-optimizing router (the design Akien HARD-AGREED is 'what I was trying to build all along'). It is therefore no longer a spawned_ticket of THIS decision — this decision now covers only the fixture + smoke + operational run, which DEPEND ON that epic's increment 3 (Hex registered + routable) shipping first. Cross-linked via links.decisions.

## Decision narrative
DickSimnel is code-complete (device/shim/worker-listener/ToolLoop with native tool-calling/Granny routing+launch+bus/Critic all wired). The ONLY missing thing is a proven run: the single recorded autonomous ToolLoop dispatch was Jun-11 on the old OpenRouter/opus config and hit max-turns(20)→escalation+listener crash (the feed_type bug, since fixed). The current devstral/ollama path has NEVER reached DONE in an agentic loop. A two-Explore scan found the real first domino is NOT Granny/bus but inference routing: every Ollama ModelSpec is bound to source `ollama_cloud`; the local `ollama` source (base_url from INFERENCE_ENDPOINT) has ZERO models, so a worker dispatch for devstral resolves to the cloud, never to Hex. Hex (Mac Studio M1 Max 32GB, 10.0.0.100) is now up with devstral-small-2:24b pulled (15.2GB, fits). The harness = (1) [MOVED to the router epic, increment 3] register Hex + point INFERENCE_ENDPOINT at Hex, (2) a trivial SAFE builder-role fixture ticket (T-ds-hello-build, a create not a delete), (3) a repeatable live pytest driving _run_inference against real devstral@Hex (T-ds-smoke-pytest — the keystone proof artifact). Then the operational run: start Granny with bus + DickSimnel.0, dispatch the hello ticket, watch dispatch_ack→ToolLoop→DONE→close. Hex lifts the DS cost constraint (free local inference).

## Hypothesis
After these ship (and the router epic's increment 3 has made Hex routable), a worker dispatch for devstral-small-2:24b routes to the local Ollama on Hex (not cloud), and DickSimnel.0 drives a real devstral ToolLoop that emits native tool_calls, executes a Write, returns DONE, and closes the trivial ticket — the first proven exists→builds→closes cycle under the current config.

## Measurement Signal
Inference Proxy selection log shows source=`ollama` @ http://10.0.0.100:11434 for the worker dispatch; the live pytest goes green (DONE envelope + ticket closed + SMOKE_OK.txt with expected content); devstral emits native tool_calls rather than repeating the Jun-11 max-turns escalation.

## Intention
I intend that DickSimnel runs real builds on free local inference (Hex), so the CC build mechanism copies down to a cheap/local model and the DS cost constraint lifts.
